root.sql:
SELECT pka_rep_tel.fp_get_number_thai (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, trim( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename ) as prename , trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ) || ' ' || trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , ( case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' then 'เงินกู้ฉุกเฉิน' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' then 'เงินกู้สามัญ' else 'เงินกู้พิเศษ' end ) as loan_type ,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, to_date( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract ,
/*ATM สัญญาเก่า ให้หมดในปี สัญญาในปี ให้หมดในอีก 1 ปี ถ้าไม่ใช่ ATM แต่ วันสิ้นสุดเกิน ปี 2050 ให้ใช้ เริ่มสัญญา + 10000 วัน */
( case when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract < sc_acc_m_account_constant.beginning_of_account then to_date( sc_acc_m_account_constant.ending_of_account , 'dd/mm/yyyy') when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract >= sc_acc_m_account_constant.beginning_of_account then to_date( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + 365 , 'dd/mm/yyyy') when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract > sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + 10000 then to_date( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + 10000 , 'dd/mm/yyyy') else to_date( sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') end ) as ending_of_contract ,
pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_conno(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) * 100 as loan_int_rate, ---อัตราดอกเบี้ยตามสัญญา sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as principal_balance ,sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ,tab2.seq_no FROM sc_cls_confirm_data, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_acc_m_account_constant ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
,( select sum(1)over(order by sum_principal_balance desc ) as seq_no /*เทียบเท่า comulative sum ถ้าเอา 50 คน ก้อเอา seq_no <= 50 */ ,membership_no ,sum_principal_balance from ( select sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ,sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_principal_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'สอ' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '28/06/2024' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no order by sum_principal_balance desc /*เรียงหนี้รวม จากมากไปหาน้อย*/ ) tab1 ) tab2 WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = tab2.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'สอ' )
and tab2.seq_no <= '!seq_no_1!' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type < '03' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '09210' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '28/06/2024' order by seq_no ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance desc
